exceptions.title: Buffer Overflow via toBigIntLE() Function
exceptions.reason: No patched version exists (all versions <= 1.1.5 affected, firstPatchedVersion: null). The vulnerable toBigIntLE()/toBigIntBE() functions are not called directly in our codebase. bigint-buffer is only pulled in as a transitive dependency through the Solana SDK chain. @solana/spl-token@0.4.14 is the latest stable release and still depends on @solana/buffer-layout-utils@^0.2.0 which requires bigint-buffer. The vulnerability requires attacker-controlled input to toBigIntLE() to trigger a buffer overflow crash (DoS, not RCE). Our usage of @solana/spl-token is limited to token account queries and does not process untrusted bigint data through this path.
mitigations: CVE ignored via pnpm.auditConfig.ignoreCves in package.json
Security audit added to CI pipeline to catch new vulnerabilities
No direct usage of bigint-buffer APIs in application code
